creator: bsd@bontempi.net
text:
On FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE, handbrake dumps core when navigating to select source.

I tested with mate, kde and xfce desktops.

It is installed from "latest" pkg repository (Version: 1.0.7), on HP z620 with Xeon CPU E5-1650 and 16GB ECC ram.

When launched from cli, it dumps core with message:

[1]    62999 segmentation fault (core dumped)  HandBrake


I tested it on a different machine (FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE) and it was working fine.

But, after upgrading ports, it started to dumps core there as well.

It seems it is not related to HandBrake, but to some related library.
